# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"

upstreams:
- name: user-service-upstream
  slots: 10
  healthchecks:
    active:
      http_path: /health
      timeout: 1
      consecutive_failures: 2
      interval: 5
      unhealthy:
        http_statuses: [500, 503]
        tcp_failures: 2
        timeouts: 2
    passive:
      unhealthy:
        http_failures: 3
        tcp_failures: 3
        timeouts: 3

- name: product-service-upstream
  slots: 10
  healthchecks:
    active:
      http_path: /health
      timeout: 1
      consecutive_failures: 2
      interval: 5
      unhealthy:
        http_statuses: [500, 503]
        tcp_failures: 2
        timeouts: 2
    passive:
      unhealthy:
        http_failures: 3
        tcp_failures: 3
        timeouts: 3

targets:
- target: 192.168.1.10:8080
  weight: 100
  upstream: user-service-upstream
- target: 192.168.1.11:8080
  weight: 100
  upstream: user-service-upstream
- target: 192.168.1.20:8080
  weight: 100
  upstream: product-service-upstream
- target: 192.168.1.21:8080
  weight: 100
  upstream: product-service-upstream
- target: 192.168.1.22:8080
  weight: 100
  upstream: product-service-upstream

services:
- name: user-service
  host: user-service-upstream
  port: 80
  protocol: http
  retries: 3
  connect_timeout: 5000
  write_timeout: 5000
  read_timeout: 5000

- name: product-service
  host: product-service-upstream
  port: 80
  protocol: http
  retries: 3
  connect_timeout: 5000
  write_timeout: 5000
  read_timeout: 5000

routes:
- name: users-route
  paths:
  - /users
  methods:
  - GET
  - POST
  protocols:
  - http
  - https
  service: user-service
  strip_path: true

- name: products-route
  paths:
  - /products
  - /items
  methods:
  - GET
  - POST
  - PUT
  - DELETE
  protocols:
  - http
  - https
  service: product-service
  strip_path: true
